subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Hearken unto the Call of the All-Glorious, for verily He hath come with His most great and supreme glory. By God, He hath taken His seat [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم ان استمع ندآء الجلیل انه اتی بمجده الاعظم العظیم تالله قد استقر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
